text.title: Django Services Layer Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the change perform writes across ≥2 models or trigger side effects?

conclusion.verdict: make args kw-only and fully typed

text.example: View POST /orders/ accepts payload, creates Order + OrderLine + AuditLog, then sends confirmation email. Extract into order_create(*, user: User, items: list[dict], notes: str | None = None) -> Order. Wrap in @transaction.atomic because 3 writes. Replace send_email.delay(order.id) with transaction.on_commit(lambda: send_email.delay(order.id)). View becomes a 4-line dispatch.
